{{Infobox book
| name = Waybound
| slug = cradle-12-waybound
| precedes = [[Threshold: Stories from Cradle (novel)|Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
| follows = [[Dreadgod (novel)|Dreadgod]]
| cover = [[File:Cover-cradle-12-waybound.png|250px]]
| released = 2023
| isbn = 9781959001676
| publisher = Hidden Gnome Publishing
| pages = 516
}}

== Plot summary ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The story begins with a cosmic sacrifice: as [[the Mad King]] [[Daruman]] arrives on [[Vesper]] with his fortress-world [[Tal’gullour]], Ozriel ([[Eithan]]) sacrifices himself to allow [[Suriel]] to escape through Way{{!}}the Way. In the aftermath, [[Lindon]] focuses on preparing his allies within a repurposed pocket world named [[Ghostwind Hall]]. Using stolen [[Monarch artifacts]] and his [[Soulforge]], [[Lindon]] restores [[Mercy]]’s spirit—strengthening her link to the The Book of Eternal Night{{!}}Book of Eternal Night—and initiates rigorous training for his companions, including [[Orthos]] and [[Little Blue]]. As [[Lindon]] prepares to fight, he crafts a powerful bow from the corpse of the [[Silent King]] and provides [[Ziel]] with advanced resources to prepare for the [[Dreadgod]] [[Weeping Dragon]].

Conflict erupts when [[Reigan Shen]] launches attacks against [[Sacred Valley]]. [[Lindon]] successfully repels him using the [[Bow of the Silent King]], but [[Shen]] returns with [[Malice]] and [[Northstrider]] in a coordinated assault. [[Lindon]] survives the onslaught by utilizing his [[Hollow Domain]] and summoning an echo of [[Ozmanthus Arelius]]. During these battles, [[Lindon]] engages in a high-stakes duel with [[Northstrider]], eventually using [[Dross]] to manipulate the [[Monarch]]'s codex and stealing his power via the [[Consume]] technique. Meanwhile, [[Yerin]] receives guidance from a projection of the [[Sword Sage]] to master new combat authorities, and [[Mercy]] advances to [[Archlord]] status.

The war escalates as [[Reigan Shen]] attempts to trap [[Yerin]] in the pocket world, forcing her to cut her way through Way{{!}}the Way into a massive battlefield. [[Lindon]] faces the [[Weeping Dragon]] alone, eventually using a self-destructive [[Enforcer technique]] to protect his friends. In a climactic sequence, [[Ziel]] uses a [[Grand Oath Array]] to accelerate a [[Penance arrow]], successfully piercing and killing the [[Weeping Dragon]]. Following this victory, [[Lindon]] consumes the [[Dreadgod]]'s power to heal his allies. The struggle continues as [[Lindon]] confronts [[Northstrider]] again, eventually persuading the [[Monarch]] to ascend. However, peace is short-lived; [[Reigan Shen]] joins forces with the [[Dreadgods]] [[Wandering Titan]] and [[Bleeding Phoenix]] to attack [[Lindon]].

As the battle reaches its peak, [[Yerin]] achieves [[Monarch]] status through the [[Death Icon]] and executes [[Akura Malice]], while [[Mercy]] discovers her identity as the '[[Joy Icon]].' In a final coordinated strike, [[Lindon]] and his allies kill both the [[Wandering Titan]] and the [[Bleeding Phoenix]]. In the chaos, [[Reigan Shen]] is betrayed and dies. Following the battle, [[Lindon]]'s companions ascend to the world of [[Threshold]], where they are met by the [[Abidan]] [[Kiuran]] and reunited with [[Eithan]]. They are sworn into the [[Reaper Division]] to intervene in dying worlds.

While his allies serve as [[Abidan]], [[Lindon]] remains on [[Cradle]], acting as a guardian and forging new weapons like the [[Phoenix Blade]]. He settles old scores, such as overpowering [[Li Markuth]], and eventually ascends to new worlds like [[Kareia]]. After being rescued by [[Akura Fury]], [[Lindon]] is reunited with his entire team on the world of [[Sanctum]], where he brings the [[Nethergate]] [[labyrinth]] to serve as a base. The narrative shifts toward [[Lindon]]'s ongoing battles against cosmic threats like the [[Class Two Fiend]] Cha’tur’niak and follows the growing legacy of those trained in The Grave{{!}}the Grave, such as young [[Lirin]].}}

== Chapter-by-chapter ==
* '''Chapter 1:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Suriel]] and Ozriel prepare to face [[the Mad King]], [[Daruman]], who arrives at the planet [[Vesper]] accompanied by his massive fortress-world, [[Tal’gullour]]. Recognizing that they cannot both survive a direct confrontation, Ozriel executes a plan to sacrifice himself so [[Suriel]] can escape through Way{{!}}the Way. After [[Suriel]] successfully slips into the currents of Way{{!}}the Way to seek help, Ozriel remains behind to engage [[Daruman]] in a final battle.}}
* '''Chapter 2:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] uses stolen [[Monarch artifacts]] and his [[Soulforge]] to successfully restore [[Mercy]]'s damaged spirit, which inadvertently strengthens her connection to the The Book of Eternal Night{{!}}Book of Eternal Night. Following this, [[Lindon]] utilizes various [[natural treasures]] and void keys to [[construct]] specialized facilities and training rooms within his repurposed pocket world. The group concludes the chapter by naming their new home 'Bright Welcome to [[Ghostwind Hall]].'}}
* '''Chapter 3:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] initiates willpower training for his companions by subjecting them to his intense, [[Dreadgod]]-like Spiritual pressure{{!}}spiritual pressure, which causes all of them to eventually collapse. Following this, [[Lindon]] begins individual training sessions, providing [[Little Blue]] with a scale for advancement and helping [[Orthos]] consume an [[Underlord Remnant]] to bolster his strength. Despite concerns regarding the time and resources needed to prepare his team for the coming fight, [[Lindon]] remains committed to his plan of rapid advancement through unconventional methods.}}
* '''Chapter 4:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] uses the skills of his enemy, [[Ozmanthus Arelius]], to craft a powerful horn from [[Subject One]]'s [[binding]], intending to use it as a leash to manipulate the [[Dreadgods]]. Meanwhile, [[Lindon]] provides [[Ziel]] with advanced resources and a new [[Divine Treasure]] to prepare him for the upcoming battle against the [[Weeping Dragon]]. To complete his own preparations, [[Lindon]] begins the difficult task of dissecting the corpse of the [[Silent King]] to forge a powerful bow.}}
* '''Chapter 5:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] leaves his pocket world to defend [[Sacred Valley]] from [[Reigan Shen]], who is launching a barrage of attacks against the valley's defensive barrier. [[Lindon]] engages the [[Monarch]] using the [[Bow of the Silent King]] and several powerful [[Penance prototype]] arrows, successfully breaking through [[Shen]]'s defenses and forcing him to flee. Despite using an [[Abidan shield]] and attempting to escape through Way{{!}}the Way, [[Shen]] finds himself pursued by [[Lindon]], who uses the arrows' Authority{{!}}authority to track him through space.}}
* '''Chapter 6:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|After driving off [[Reigan Shen]], [[Lindon]] summons several key allies to address the political instability in the Valley and appoints his sister, [[Kelsa]], as a leader for the [[Twin Star Sect]]. He provides support to [[Jai Chen]] and shares a brief, tense moment with his father before reuniting with [[Yerin]] at [[Ghostwind Hall]]. Meanwhile, in Way{{!}}the Way, the [[Judge]] [[Makiel]] attempts to locate the Reaper’s Scythe{{!}}Reaper's Scythe but is confronted by [[Suriel]], who ultimately retrieves the weapon and entrusts it to him to aid in his mission.}}
* '''Chapter 7:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ziel]] uses his [[Grand Oath Array]] to accelerate time within a tank of processed [[Dreadgod seeds]] and later experiments on himself to facilitate rapid elixirs{{!}}elixir processing. Meanwhile, [[Lindon]] provides [[Ziel]] with powerful stolen elixirs to prepare his body for future combat against [[Monarchs]] and [[Dreadgods]]. In a separate training session, [[Mercy]] and [[Lindon]] enter the The Book of Eternal Night{{!}}Book of Eternal Night, where [[Mercy]] begins aggressively breaking down her mother's memories to accelerate her own advancement.}}
* '''Chapter 8:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|After a sparring session, [[Lindon]] presents [[Yerin]] with a specialized hunger binding containing an echo of the [[Sword Sage]]. The projection allows [[Yerin]] to reunite with her former master, who provides guidance on how a [[Herald]] can resonate with a [[Sword Icon]] and copy the Authority{{!}}authority of higher-level combatants. The chapter concludes with [[Yerin]] attempting to mimic a strike from her memory of [[Eithan]] under the [[Sage]]'s instruction.}}
* '''Chapter 9:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]], [[Malice]], and [[Northstrider]] launch a coordinated assault on [[Lindon]] at [[Sacred Valley]] to prevent him from using his pocket world. After an intense exchange of high-level techniques that nearly kills Reigan Shen{{!}}Reigan, [[Lindon]] manages to survive the onslaught by utilizing his [[Hollow Domain]] and consuming the incoming energy. The battle shifts when [[Lindon]] summons an echo of [[Ozmanthus Arelius]], who effectively neutralizes the [[Monarchs]]' combined attacks and redirects their power against them before fading away.}}
* '''Chapter 10:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] and [[Little Blue]] undergo grueling training simulations against a projection of [[Eithan]], leading [[Orthos]] to commit to an accelerated diet and training regimen to reach the strength necessary to fight alongside [[Lindon]]. Meanwhile, outside [[Sacred Valley]], [[Akura Charity]] and the [[Winter Sage]] attempt to confront [[Lindon]] through his [[Silent King]] illusions, only to be met with overwhelming power and psychological manipulation. As the battle between [[Monarchs]] and [[Lindon]] continues, [[Reigan Shen]] sets off toward the [[Weeping Dragon]] in hopes of finding a way to crush [[Lindon]]'s pocket world.}}
* '''Chapter 11:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] enters a high-stakes duel with the [[Monarch]] [[Northstrider]] to stall for time before the arrival of the [[Weeping Dragon]]. Despite suffering severe physical damage during the fight, [[Lindon]] uses [[Dross]] to manipulate [[Northstrider's oracle codex]] and successfully employs the [[Consume]] technique to steal the [[Monarch]]'s power. Empowered by this stolen energy, [[Lindon]] unleashes a devastating [[dragon]]-themed attack that incapacitates [[Northstrider]] and forces [[Malice]] to retreat.}}
* '''Chapter 12:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|After successfully besting the [[Monarch]] [[Northstrider]] and absorbing his power, [[Lindon]] realizes with alarm that [[Reigan Shen]] is approaching the hidden [[Windfall]]. Meanwhile, [[Yerin]] masters a new hunger-based cycling technique called [[Phoenix Song]] while checking on the progress of their allies, [[Ziel]] and [[Orthos]]. The chapter concludes with an alarm sounding as [[Shen]]'s arrival threatens the safety of [[Sacred Valley]].}}
* '''Chapter 13:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|After [[Reigan Shen]] uses a [[Moonlight Bridge]] to trap [[Yerin]] inside the [[Ghostwind Hall]] pocket world, [[Lindon]] is left alone and exhausted on [[Windfall]]'s island facing the [[Weeping Dragon]]. [[Yerin]] manages to cut her way out of the pocket world through Way{{!}}the Way, eventually emerging into a massive battlefield where [[House Shen]] and the [[Stormcallers]] are clashing. Meanwhile, inside the pocket world, [[Mercy]] achieves her [[Archlord]] advancement by swearing an oath to bring light, while [[Ziel]] and the spirits prepare to use a [[Grand Oath Array]] to follow [[Yerin]] into Way{{!}}the Way.}}
* '''Chapter 14:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] uses labyrinth{{!}}the labyrinth to summon a ghostly echo of the [[Wandering Titan]] to fight the [[Weeping Dragon]], allowing him to banish [[Mercy]] and [[Ziel]] to a distant location. Upon arriving near [[Yerin]], [[Ziel]] uses his newfound Authority{{!}}authority as the [[Shield Icon]] to protect [[Mercy]] and [[Yerin]] from the [[Sage of Calling Storms]]. The chapter concludes with [[Yerin]] engaging the [[Sage]] in a furious battle, even as the [[Sage]] attempts to manipulate the group into helping him reach [[Lindon]].}}
* '''Chapter 15:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|As the [[Weeping Dragon]] defeats the [[Wandering Titan]] echo, [[Lindon]] is forced to flee into the [[Nethergate]] [[labyrinth]] to escape the [[Dreadgod]]'s onslaught. Inside labyrinth{{!}}the labyrinth, [[Lindon]] is rescued by a mysterious [[Sage]] named [[Larian]], who takes his Ancient Bow of the Soulseeker{{!}}Silent King Bow and prepares to fight. Meanwhile, [[Mercy]] uses her new [[Archlady]] status and the guidance of the [[Oracle Sage]] to turn the tide of a massive battle for [[House Arelius]], successfully driving back [[House Shen]]'s forces.}}
* '''Chapter 16:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|During a chaotic battle, [[Yushi]] realizes that the unexpected strength of [[Yerin]] and [[Ziel]], aided by Cladia{{!}}Cladia Arelius's tactical guidance, has turned the tide against [[House Shen]]. Despite attempting to retreat, [[Yushi]] is cornered and ultimately killed by [[Yerin]], whose power surges from absorbing the [[Herald]]'s [[Remnant]]. Following the execution, [[Ziel]] confronts the regenerating [[Storm Sage]] but is interrupted by [[Yerin]], who kills him before he can speak.}}
* '''Chapter 17:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|While [[Lindon]] struggles to stabilize the massive influx of [[Northstrider]]'s power within his spirit, [[Orthos]] and [[Little Blue]] successfully advance to the [[Herald]] stage by manifesting human forms. After being rescued from a pocket world by [[Kharrus]], [[Orthos]] and [[Little Blue]] reunite with [[Lindon]] in labyrinth{{!}}the labyrinth. Now possessing newfound strength and Authority{{!}}authority, the group prepares to face the [[Weeping Dragon]].}}
* '''Chapter 18:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|In the Void, a fragment of [[the Mad King]] gathers fifty dangerous prisoners from [[Haven]] to sow chaos among the fallen [[Abidan]] worlds, demonstrating his power by instantly unmaking a mocking Witch. Meanwhile, on [[Cradle]], [[Lindon]] engages the [[Weeping Dragon]] in a desperate battle, eventually using a lethal arrow to force a retreat by [[Larian]] and the The Eight-Man Empire{{!}}Eight-Man Empire. Simultaneously, [[Yerin]], [[Mercy]], and [[Ziel]] work with the [[Oracle Sage]] Cladia{{!}}Cladia Arelius to force open a spatial portal, preparing to teleport to [[Blackflame City]] to rejoin the fight.}}
* '''Chapter 19:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]], [[Orthos]], and [[Little Blue]] engage in a desperate battle against the [[Weeping Dragon]], with [[Lindon]] using a [[Penance arrow]] to wound the [[Dreadgod]]'s neck. Realizing the [[dragon]] is targeting his friends, [[Lindon]] performs a self-destructive [[Enforcer technique]] to force the [[dragon]]'s massive breath attack upward, saving [[Yerin]], [[Mercy]], and [[Ziel]]. Although [[Lindon]] is left powerless and falling from the sky after his feat, the distraction allows [[Ziel]] and [[Mercy]] to launch a counterattack against the wounded [[Dreadgod]].}}
* '''Chapter 20:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|As the [[Weeping Dragon]] thrashes in battle, [[Orthos]] and [[Little Blue]] use dream-spirit orbs to host copies of [[Dross]], granting the group enhanced mental capabilities and guidance. [[Mercy]] attempts to strike the [[Dreadgod]] with a [[Penance arrow]] from the Ancient Bow of the Soulseeker{{!}}Silent King Bow, but the attack is deflected. In a final desperate act, [[Ziel]] uses his remaining [[madra]] and the [[Grand Oath Array]] to accelerate the arrow, successfully piercing the [[Weeping Dragon]] and killing it.}}
* '''Chapter 21:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Following the defeat of the [[Weeping Dragon]], [[Akura Malice]] attempts to take [[Mercy]] hostage but is repelled by a transformed and empowered [[Lindon]]. After consuming the [[Dreadgod]]'s power, [[Lindon]] uses his [[Void Icon]] Authority{{!}}authority to heal his severely injured companions and moves them to the safety of the [[Windfall]] cloudship. Finally, [[Lindon]] enters the [[Soulforge]] with [[Dross]] to begin planning how to forge the [[Weeping Dragon's core binding]] into a new weapon.}}
* '''Chapter 22:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ozriel ([[Eithan]]) fights a losing battle against [[the Mad King]] until [[Judges]] [[Makiel]] and [[Suriel]] arrive to assist. After a coordinated effort involving the Reaper’s Scythe{{!}}Reaper's Scythe and [[Makiel]]'s [[Sword]], [[Suriel]] is cast into the Void while Ozriel sacrifices himself to strike a decisive blow against [[the Mad King]]. Meanwhile, the [[Monarch]] [[Reigan Shen]] deals with the [[Silent Servants]] and repairs the broken [[Remnant]] of [[Tiberian Arelius]], preparing to seek new allies.}}
* '''Chapter 23:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Following the death of a [[Dreadgod]], [[Lindon]] and his companions discuss their injuries and the dangerous consequences of [[Lindon]]'s increasing power, including his inability to ascend. Meanwhile, the [[Monarch]] [[Northstrider]] holds [[Emriss Silentborn]] prisoner in a deep-sea fortress until [[Lindon]] uses a portal and powerful summons to forcibly confront him. The chapter concludes with [[Lindon]] successfully pulling [[Northstrider]] through space to face him directly.}}
* '''Chapter 24:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] successfully persuades the [[Monarch]] [[Northstrider]] to ascend by using a hunger echo of his younger self to confront his past motivations. After [[Northstrider]] departs, [[Lindon]] retrieves [[Emriss Silentborn]] from her prison, only for her to reveal through a vision that [[Reigan Shen]] is meeting with the [[Bleeding Phoenix]] and the [[Wandering Titan]]. Emriss Silentborn{{!}}Emriss warns [[Lindon]] that the [[Dreadgods]] are cleverer than expected and cannot be negotiated with, leaving him to face the remaining threats of [[Sha Miara]] and [[Malice]].}}
* '''Chapter 25:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|While exploring the seventh page of her Book, [[Mercy]] encounters a manifestation of her mother's ideal self before [[Lindon]] is suddenly and violently pulled from the dreamscape. [[Lindon]] reappears in a wasteland, cornered by [[Reigan Shen]] and two [[Dreadgods]] who propose a deal to manage the world's population as their food source. Rejecting their terms, [[Lindon]] unleashes his new Dreadgod weapon{{!}}Dreadgod weapons and begins a massive battle against them.}}
* '''Chapter 26:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] undergoes a grueling months-long process of integrating her mother's power to advance to the rank of [[Herald]]. After successfully completing her advancement, she confronts [[Akura Malice]] in an attempt to reach a peaceful resolution. However, the meeting turns into a violent confrontation when [[Malice]]'s plan to capture [[Mercy]]'s friends fails, leading [[Yerin]] and several others to launch an assault on the castle.}}
* '''Chapter 27:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] engages in a massive battle against the [[Wandering Titan]] and the [[Bleeding Phoenix]] while [[Reigan Shen]] intervenes, eventually transforming into a white-and-gold lion to fight alongside the [[Dreadgods]]. Simultaneously, [[Yerin]] and her allies struggle against [[Akura Malice]]'s overwhelming Shadow{{!}}shadow constructs and targeted attacks on [[Little Blue]]. After [[Dross]] provides combat simulations to guide her, [[Yerin]] achieves a profound realization about her true nature and summons the [[Death Icon]] to execute [[Malice]].}}
* '''Chapter 28:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|After [[Yerin]] ascends to [[Monarch]] via the [[Death Icon]], [[Mercy]] uses a [[Penance arrow]] to kill her mother, [[Akura Malice]]. Following the battle, Emriss Silentborn{{!}}Emriss assists [[Ziel]] in manifesting his [[Remnant]] and meets with a grieving [[Mercy]] and an restless [[Yerin]]. The group discusses strategic ways to join [[Lindon]], who is struggling to survive a continuous onslaught from the [[Dreadgods]] and other [[Monarchs]].}}
* '''Chapter 29:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ziel]] successfully advances to [[Herald]] by engaging in a brutal physical battle with his [[Remnant]], while [[Mercy]] discovers her identity as the '[[Joy Icon]]' through a vision of her mother's memories. [[Emriss Silentborn]] uses the [[Queen’s Gift]] to stabilize both new [[Monarchs]], allowing them to join the battlefield. As [[Lindon]] faces the [[Wandering Titan]], a coalition of [[Monarchs]] arrives to support him in a final stand against the [[Dreadgods]].}}
* '''Chapter 30:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] is betrayed by [[Sha Miara]] and [[Emriss Silentborn]], leading to his death and ascension as a [[Remnant]]. Amidst the chaos, [[Lindon]] and his allies launch a coordinated assault that successfully kills both the [[Wandering Titan]] and the [[Bleeding Phoenix]]. Following the battle, [[Lindon]] wakes up three weeks later to find that his companions have ascended to the heavens.}}
* '''Chapter 31:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] and her companions successfully ascend from [[Cradle]] to the world of [[Threshold]], where they are met by a condescending [[Abidan]] named [[Kiuran]]. After a tense confrontation with [[Kiuran]], [[Eithan]] appears in his role as [[Judge]] Ozriel to intervene and protect the group. [[Eithan]] reveals that the heavens are in disarray and explains that [[Lindon]] remains stuck in [[Cradle]] due to an unstable connection, tasking the group with helping to re-establish control over Way{{!}}the Way.}}
* '''Chapter 32:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] prepares to leave [[Sacred Valley]] by teaching his followers the '[[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]]' to ensure they can protect themselves in his absence. Meanwhile, [[Akura Mercy]], [[Ziel]], and [[Yerin]] are formally sworn in by the [[Abidan]] as members of the newly formed [[Reaper Division]] under [[Eithan]]'s supervision. The chapter concludes with the group traveling to a station called 'The Grave{{!}}the Grave' to begin their mission of intervening in dying worlds.}}
* '''Chapter 33:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] hosts a spiritual meeting where he secures a soul-oath{{!}}soul oath from the The Eight-Man Empire{{!}}Eight-Man Empire to prevent future conquests and distributes powerful weapons to [[Larian]] and Del'rek{{!}}Del’rek. Meanwhile, in the [[Fractured Realms]], [[Princess R’leya]] successfully summons a powerful heroine named [[Heron]], who instantly kills the Dark [[Lord]] [[Zyrellon]] before departing through her own portal. Finally, a blonde [[Sage]] breaks into a spatial vault to rescue the [[Remnant]] of [[Tiberian]], only to be confronted by the [[Void Sage]], [[Lindon]], who arrives to reclaim his inheritance from the [[Remnant]] [[Shen]].}}
* '''Chapter 34:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] negotiates with the Fire Giant King [[Sulthurus]] and the mechanical High Priest [[Bardolph]], preventing their destructive plans by providing World [[Trees]] to the [[Ulethians]] and [[Great Bison]] to the [[Fire Giants]]. After destroying [[Bardolph]]'s [[Flesh-warped Soldier]] and healing [[Sulthurus]]'s scars, she secures a peaceful balance between the two factions. Meanwhile, [[Lindon]] enters the [[Soulforge]] to begin the complex process of forging the [[Phoenix Blade]] using [[Netherclaw]], the [[Sword Sage's blade]], and a [[Bleeding Phoenix]] core.}}
* '''Chapter 35:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Li Markuth]] returns to [[Cradle]] to reclaim his clan's dominance, only to be confronted at the [[Seven-Year Festival]] by Lindon{{!}}Wei Shi Lindon. Despite [[Markuth]]'s immense power and advanced techniques, [[Lindon]] reveals himself as a formidable guardian equipped with treasures forged from the [[Dreadgods]]. The chapter concludes with [[Lindon]] overpowering [[Markuth]], seeking retribution for his past death and the loss of his mother.}}
* '''Chapter 36:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ziel]] arrives at a moon colony to save its inhabitants by injecting energy into their dying [[Worldline]], eventually agreeing to help the local anthropologist establish order through a new tax code. Meanwhile, [[Lindon]] ascends to a new world called [[Kareia]], where he faces hostility from local authorities after revealing Suriel's glass bead{{!}}Suriel's marble. The conflict escalates until [[Akura Fury]] and other [[Abidan]] arrive to rescue [[Lindon]], leading him through a portal toward an unknown destination.}}
* '''Chapter 37:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] travels to the world of [[Sanctum]] with [[Fury]], where he is reunited with [[Yerin]], Blue, [[Orthos]], [[Mercy]], [[Ziel]], and [[Eithan]]. During the emotional reunion, [[Lindon]] presents [[Yerin]] with gifts including a new [[sword]] and a ring, and he reveals that he has brought the entire [[labyrinth]] from [[Cradle]] to serve as a base. Later, [[Lindon]] shares a quiet moment with [[Suriel]], returning her candle-flame marble and listening to her share her story.}}
* '''Chapter 38:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] engages in a massive battle against Cha’tur’niak, a country-sized [[Class Two Fiend]] that is devouring the planet. After [[Lindon]] manages to blast the creature into space, he is saved from a plummeting fall by a local prince who is significant to the world's [[Fate]]. [[Lindon]] reassures the despairing prince that he intends to kill the [[Fiend]] and restore their world before flying back into combat.}}
* '''Chapter 39:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|On his seventh birthday, a boy named [[Lirin]] visits his father's [[workshop]] in The Grave{{!}}the Grave to undergo a spiritual test. After placing his hand into a bowl of energy, [[Lirin]]'s [[madra]] causes the liquid to react by forming both crystals and steam. His father concludes the test by telling [[Lirin]] it is time to make his own badges{{!}}badge.}}

== Characters ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ziel]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Weeping Dragon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Emriss Silentborn]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Suriel]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ozmanthus Arelius]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ozriel (Cradle)]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Wandering Titan]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Silent King]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Makiel]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mad King]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Larian]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Akura Malice]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Cladia]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Netherworld Empress]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yushi]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Sha Miara]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Charity]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Shen]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Calling Storms]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Fury]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Tiberian]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Daruman]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lirin]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Storm Sage]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Thunder Fairy]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Markuth]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Li Markuth]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Sage of a Thousand Eyes]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Subject One]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Oracle Sage]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Wei Grand Elder]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Gryth]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Jai Chen]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Winter Sage]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Suu]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Del'rek]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Sage of Calling Storms]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ruby]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Archlady]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Fisher Gesha]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Titan]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Sage of Red Faith]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Aunt Charity]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Min Shuei]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Red Faith]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Zakariel]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Void Sage]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ghost]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Rune Queen]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lirin's father]]}}

== Locations & groups ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[labyrinth]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Sacred Valley]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Abidan]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Monarchs]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Windfall]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Cradle]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Eight-Man Empire]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ghostwind Hall]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Moongrave]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[House Shen]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Twin Star Sect]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Grave]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Trackless Sea]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[House Arelius]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Sanctum]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Judges]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Arelius family]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Redmoon Hall]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ashwind continent]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Court of Seven (Cradle)]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Li clan]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Blackflame Empire]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Silverlords]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Akura clan]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Everwood]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Hounds]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ashwind]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Vesper]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Titans]]}}

== Abilities & sacred arts ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Hollow Domain]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Grand Oath Array]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Shield Icon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[hunger madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[black dragon's breath]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Bow Icon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Empty Palm]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[soulfire]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Consume]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Death Icon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Striker technique]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Soul Cloak]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Storm madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Dragon Descends]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Phoenix Song]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Forged madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Goldsign]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Wind aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[dream aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Striker techniques]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Strings of Shadow]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Sword Icon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Strength Icon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Shadestep]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reaper’s Sword]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Enforcer technique]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Bloodforged Iron body]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Path of Black Flame]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Blackflame madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Oracle Icon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Crown Icon]]}}

== Artifacts & constructs ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ancient Bow of the Soulseeker]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Book of Eternal Night]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dragon Icon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Penance]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Soulforge]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Remnant]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Moonlight Bridge]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Penance arrow]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[void key]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dreadgod weapon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Wraith Horn]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Wavedancer]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Netherclaw]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Bow of the Silent King]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Divine Treasure]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|oracle codex}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Remnants]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[dream tablets]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|communication construct}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Shadow Icon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Tiberian Arelius’s Remnant]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dreadgod arm]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Blood Sage’s Remnant]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Penance prototype]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Titan barrier]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Sword of Makiel]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Heart Icon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|blue-swirling portal}}

== Events & concepts ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dreadgods]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dreadgod]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Void Icon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Bleeding Phoenix]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Monarch]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Way]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Herald]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Blackflame]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Archlord]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Slumbering Wraith]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Empty Ghost]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[pure madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Sage]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Way]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Fate]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|pocket world}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Void (Cradle)]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Phoenix]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Blood Shadow]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Blue (Cradle)]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Judge]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[soulspace]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Archlord revelation]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Paths of Heaven]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Spiritual Origin test]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Jade]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|soul-oath}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lowgold]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Truegold]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Forged]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Uncrowned King Tournament]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[King’s Key]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reaper]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Genesis]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Way Between Worlds (Cradle)]]}}

== Sources ==
* https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cradle
* https://openlibrary.org/works/OL35801131W

{{Willverse books nav}}

[[Category:Books]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
